perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in an indoor hallway where a young man with dark hair, wearing a white oversized shirt over a black outfit, walks away from the camera and then stops to look back as if searching for something. (2) A young woman in a white tank top and lace-covered pants runs towards him holding a brown clipboard. (3) The man takes the clipboard and signs it with a marker while another young man in a striped sweater appears behind him. (4) The woman looks at the clipboard with a confused expression, then turns it toward the camera to reveal a handwritten message. (5) All three individuals stand together, waving and smiling at the camera as a celebratory filter effect is applied.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced, suspenseful orchestral track accompanied by cartoonish sound effects like 'boing' and 'shimmer' to emphasize the visual realization of something missing. (2) The music shifts to a more upbeat, triumphant theatrical pop song with lyrics as the message is revealed. (3) The video ends with the sound of a studio-recorded laughter track and the fading upbeat music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '什麼東西掉了...' (Something dropped...) - A hook text appearing at the start with a curious tone. (2) '路人阿千撿到 ->' (Passerby Ah-Chien found it ->) - Identification text for the female character. (3) '(這是你們掉的)' ((This is yours)) - Functional text representing the girl's unspoken dialogue. (4) '(???)' - Decorative text conveying the girl's confusion. (5) '請去影院支持《冥婚開泰》' (Please go to the theater to support 'The Red Envelope') - Promotional text written on the clipboard. (6) 'Ha Ha Ha' - Decorative text representing laughter. (7) '快進影院支持 <3' (Hurry to the theater to support <3) - Closing call-to-action text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (looking for lost item) -> Interaction (returning item) -> Reveal (promotional message) -> Outro (group waving).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male in white jacket (PP Krit), 1 male in striped sweater (Billkin), and 1 female in white tank top (Ah-Chien).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: PP Krit is wearing an oversized white jacket over a black shirt and pants. Billkin is wearing a dark and white horizontal striped sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor hallway with neutral beige walls, wooden doors, and a large movie poster on the left wall featuring the title 'The Red Envelope'.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic promotional skit designed to encourage viewers to watch the movie 'The Red Envelope' (冥婚開泰). It uses popular Thai actors PP Krit and Billkin along with an influencer to create a viral-style moment where a 'lost item' turns out to be a signed promotional board.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire skit centers around revealing a board that asks viewers to support the movie 'The Red Envelope' in theaters.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of variety-show style captions and the appearance of the famous CP duo Billkin & PP Krit.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the celebrity status of the actors and the 'found object' trope to deliver a promotional message in an engaging, non-traditional advertising format.
